name: New Orleans Olive Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the olives; reserve 3 tbsp. brine.
2. Slice celery thinly.
3. In a medium bowl, combine olives, garlic, onions, celery, pimentos, and capers.
4. In a small bowl, whisk together reserved olive brine, oregano, pepper, and vinegar until combined.
5. Add olive oil to the mixture in a slow, steady stream, whisking constantly.
6. Pour the dressing over the salad; toss well.
7. Spoon into a jar with a tight-fitting lid.
8. Refrigerate until served or up to 3 weeks. Serve at room temperature.
Makes about 5 cups.
